summary: GH-99 spec is approved for a minimal repo-local package resolution contract. The spec keeps scope limited to a local index, manifest-aligned package path resolution, and offline validator consumption, and explicitly excludes lockfile semantics, hosted registry, marketplace/sync, install/update UI, runtime execution, Core/Harbor/App changes, Core fixture consumption, and write guardrail behavior.
reviewed_validation_summary: Spec review consumed `.loom/specs/GH-99/spec.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-99/plan.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-99/implementation-contract.md`, and `.loom/specs/GH-99/task-carrier.md`; `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-99 --json` and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-99 --json` passed.
follow_ups: GH-100 must define package ref / lock semantics before lock consumption can be claimed.
GH-101 through GH-103 must cover sample read package closeout, Core fixture consumption, and deferred write guardrail.
